interventions.name: B2 Intervention 1
interventions.summary: gene-expression flow maps that force explicit intermediate reasoning from DNA to trait

interventions.name: B2 Intervention 2
interventions.summary: genotype-phenotype-environment comparison tables to separate causal roles

interventions.name: B2 Intervention 3
interventions.summary: inheritance-case sorts that distinguish transmission patterns from molecular explanation

interventions.name: B2 Intervention 4
interventions.summary: biotechnology evidence reviews that focus on method limits and claim scope
